subject: [PATCH nfs-utils v2 09/16] exportd/mountd: add netlink support for the auth.unix.ip cache

2026-03-30.patch_summary: This patch adds netlink support to the auth.unix.ip cache in the exportd/mountd components of the nfs-utils package. It introduces a generic helper function, cache_genl_open(), which sets up the command and notification sockets for a given netlink family. The sunrpc genl family is resolved at startup and silently falls back if not supported by the kernel. The patch also adds an ip_map (auth.unix.ip) netlink cache handler that resolves IP addresses using client_resolve() and responds via SUNRPC_CMD_IP_MAP_SET_REQS with domain names or negative entries. Finally, it wires the sunrpc notification socket into several functions to enable netlink communication for the auth.unix.ip cache.
